nasb.text: The policemen reported these words to the chief magistrates. They were afraid when they heard that they were Romans,

esv.text: The police reported these words to the magistrates, and they were afraid when they heard that they were Roman citizens.

cnv.text: 法警把這番話回報裁判官，裁判官聽說他們是羅馬人，就害怕起來，

ccb.text: 差役回报官长。官长得知保罗和西拉都是罗马公民，非常害怕，

csbs.text: 那些刑杖官把这些话报告给官长们，官长们一听他们是罗马公民，就惧怕了，
